functions.name: Missing skip link
functions.description: Add a skip link to allow keyboard users to bypass navigation.

recommendation.title: Add skip navigation link
recommendation.description: Add a skip link to allow keyboard users to bypass navigation.

fix: Add a skip link at the top of the page
Link to the main content area

functions.name: Missing lang attribute
functions.description: Add lang attribute to the html element for screen readers.

recommendation.title: Add lang attribute to HTML
recommendation.description: Add lang attribute to the html element for screen readers.

catches: Missing lang attribute on HTML element
Screen readers can't pronounce content correctly
fix: Add lang attribute to <html> tag (e.g., lang="en")
Use appropriate language code for the content

params.message: HTML missing lang attribute - screen readers need this to pronounce correctly

functions.name: Keyboard navigation issues
functions.description: All interactive elements must be keyboard accessible.

recommendation.title: Ensure keyboard accessibility
recommendation.description: All interactive elements must be keyboard accessible.

catches: Users can't navigate with Tab key

functions.name: Missing live region for dynamic content
functions.description: Use aria-live for content that updates dynamically.

recommendation.title: Add live regions for dynamic content
recommendation.description: Use aria-live for content that updates dynamically.

fix: Add aria-live attribute to dynamic content regions
Use polite or assertive based on urgency

functions.name: Missing reduced motion preference
functions.description: Add media query for prefers-reduced-motion.

recommendation.title: Respect reduced motion preference
recommendation.description: Add media query for prefers-reduced-motion.

catches: Animations play for users who prefer reduced motion
fix: Disable or reduce animations for users who prefer it

functions.name: Short timeout without warning
functions.description: Sessions with short timeouts should warn users.

recommendation.title: Warn users of short timeouts
recommendation.description: Sessions with short timeouts should warn users.

fix: Allow users to adjust timeout settings

functions.name: Unclear error messages
functions.description: Error messages should clearly explain what went wrong.

recommendation.title: Make error messages clear
recommendation.description: Error messages should clearly explain what went wrong.

catches: Users don't know how to fix errors
fix: Explain what went wrong and how to fix it

functions.name: Missing focus management after interactions
functions.description: After closing modals, navigating, or dynamic updates, move focus to a logical place so keyboard users don't lose their position.

recommendation.title: Manage focus after interactions
recommendation.description: After closing modals, navigating, or dynamic updates, move focus to a logical place so keyboard users don't lose their position.

catches: Focus not moved after modal close
Focus lost after dynamic content updates
Users lose their place in page
fix: Move focus to relevant element after interaction
Use focus-visible for custom focus indicators

functions.name: Heading level skipped
functions.description: Heading levels should not skip (e.g., h1 to h3 without h2).

recommendation.title: Maintain proper heading hierarchy
recommendation.description: Heading levels should not skip (e.g., h1 to h3 without h2).

catches: Heading levels skipped (e.g., h1 to h3)
Screen reader users can't navigate structure
fix: Don't skip from h1 to h3 without h2

functions.name: Image missing alt text
functions.description: Images need alt text for screen readers. Use empty alt="" for decorative images.

recommendation.title: Add alt text to images
recommendation.description: Images need alt text for screen readers. Use empty alt="" for decorative images.

fix: Add alt text to all images
Describe image content in alt text

params.message: Image missing alt attribute - screen readers cannot describe this image

functions.name: Missing ARIA labels
functions.description: Buttons and links need accessible names. Use aria-label or aria-labelledby.

recommendation.title: Add ARIA labels to interactive elements
recommendation.description: Buttons and links need accessible names. Use aria-label or aria-labelledby.

functions.name: Insufficient link text
functions.description: Links should describe their destination. Avoid "click here" or "read more".

recommendation.title: Use descriptive link text
recommendation.description: Links should describe their destination. Avoid "click here" or "read more".

catches: Link text not descriptive (e.g., click here)
fix: Avoid generic phrases like click here

functions.name: Potential color contrast issue
functions.description: Text should have 4.5:1 contrast ratio against background.

recommendation.title: Ensure sufficient color contrast
recommendation.description: Text should have 4.5:1 contrast ratio against background.

catches: Text hard to read for visually impaired users
fix: Ensure 4.5:1 contrast ratio for normal text

functions.name: Missing focus indicators
functions.description: Interactive elements need visible focus indicators for keyboard users.

recommendation.title: Add focus indicators
recommendation.description: Interactive elements need visible focus indicators for keyboard users.

catches: Keyboard users can't see focused element

params.message: Focus indicator removed - keyboard users won't know which element is focused

functions.name: Form input missing label
functions.description: Form inputs need associated labels for screen readers.

recommendation.title: Add labels to form inputs
recommendation.description: Form inputs need associated labels for screen readers.

catches: Screen readers can't identify field purpose
fix: Use for attribute to associate label

params.message: Form input missing label - screen reader users won't know what this field is for

functions.name: Complex language may cause cognitive load
functions.description: Avoid complex sentences and jargon. Aim for reading level appropriate for audience.

recommendation.title: Use clear, simple language
recommendation.description: Avoid complex sentences and jargon. Aim for reading level appropriate for audience.

functions.name: Inconsistent navigation across pages
functions.description: Navigation should be consistent across pages for predictability.

recommendation.title: Maintain consistent navigation
recommendation.description: Navigation should be consistent across pages for predictability.

functions.name: Unpredictable behavior on focus/hover
functions.description: Focus and hover should not cause unexpected content changes.

recommendation.title: Make behavior predictable
recommendation.description: Focus and hover should not cause unexpected content changes.

fix: Don't change content on focus/hover alone

functions.name: No error prevention for forms
functions.description: Provide confirmation for important actions and reversible submissions.

recommendation.title: Add error prevention
recommendation.description: Provide confirmation for important actions and reversible submissions.

fix: Add confirmation dialogs for important actions

functions.name: Missing help or instructions
functions.description: Provide help text and clear instructions for complex forms.

recommendation.title: Add help and instructions
recommendation.description: Provide help text and clear instructions for complex forms.

catches: No help text for complex forms
fix: Add help text for complex fields

action.message: Form input without help text or description

functions.name: Focus order not logical
functions.description: Tab order should follow visual layout from left to right, top to bottom.

recommendation.title: Ensure logical focus order
recommendation.description: Tab order should follow visual layout from left to right, top to bottom.

catches: Focus order doesn't follow visual layout

action.message: Manual tabindex found - may disrupt natural focus order

functions.name: Missing or unclear page title
functions.description: Each page should have a unique, descriptive title.

recommendation.title: Add descriptive page titles
recommendation.description: Each page should have a unique, descriptive title.

fix: Add unique title to each page
Include page name and site name

functions.name: Missing semantic landmarks
functions.description: Use <header>, <nav>, <main>, <footer> for screen reader navigation.

recommendation.title: Use semantic HTML landmarks
recommendation.description: Use <header>, <nav>, <main>, <footer> for screen reader navigation.

fix: Add header, nav, main, footer elements

functions.name: Auto-playing media without controls
functions.description: Auto-playing audio/video must have controls and respect user preference.

recommendation.title: Don't auto-play media with sound
recommendation.description: Auto-playing audio/video must have controls and respect user preference.

action.message: Media element may auto-play without controls

functions.name: CAPTCHA without accessible alternative
functions.description: CAPTCHA should have audio alternative or be replaceable with less exclusionary method.

recommendation.title: Provide CAPTCHA alternatives
recommendation.description: CAPTCHA should have audio alternative or be replaceable with less exclusionary method.

catches: Users with disabilities can't complete verification

action.message: CAPTCHA usage detected - ensure accessible alternative

functions.name: Link purpose not clear from context
functions.description: Link purpose should be clear from link text alone or context.

recommendation.title: Clear link purpose
recommendation.description: Link purpose should be clear from link text alone or context.

action.message: Link with generic text - use descriptive link text

functions.name: Only one way to find page
functions.description: Users should have multiple ways to find pages (search, navigation, site map).

recommendation.title: Provide multiple ways to find pages
recommendation.description: Users should have multiple ways to find pages (search, navigation, site map).

catches: Only one way to find pages

functions.name: Focus not visible
functions.description: Keyboard focus must have visible indicator at all times.

recommendation.title: Make focus clearly visible
recommendation.description: Keyboard focus must have visible indicator at all times.

catches: Keyboard users lose track of focus

action.message: Focus outline removed - ensure visible focus indicator

functions.name: Link behavior changes context unexpectedly
functions.description: Links should not open new windows/tabs without warning.

recommendation.title: Don't change context unexpectedly
recommendation.description: Links should not open new windows/tabs without warning.

catches: Links open new windows without warning
fix: Announce link behavior to screen readers

action.message: Link opens new window without rel="noopener noreferrer"

functions.name: No error suggestions provided
functions.description: When errors are detected, suggest corrections.

recommendation.title: Provide error suggestions
recommendation.description: When errors are detected, suggest corrections.

catches: Users don't know how to fix errors

action.message: Error handling found - ensure error messages suggest corrections

functions.name: Status messages not announced
functions.description: Status messages should be announced without focus change using aria-live.

recommendation.title: Announce status messages
recommendation.description: Status messages should be announced without focus change using aria-live.

action.message: Notification component found - ensure aria-live for screen readers

functions.name: Clickable target too small
functions.description: Clickable targets must be at least 24 by 24 CSS pixels. Small targets are difficult for users with motor impairments.

recommendation.title: Use minimum 24x24px target size
recommendation.description: Clickable targets must be at least 24 by 24 CSS pixels. Small targets are difficult for users with motor impairments.

action.message: Target size less than 24px - users with motor impairments may struggle

functions.name: Drag operation without keyboard alternative
functions.description: Drag operations must have a keyboard alternative (click + move, or two clicks). Users cannot use drag with keyboards or assistive tech.

recommendation.title: Provide keyboard alternative for drag
recommendation.description: Drag operations must have a keyboard alternative (click + move, or two clicks). Users cannot use drag with keyboards or assistive tech.

action.message: Drag operation detected - ensure keyboard alternative exists

functions.name: Focus indicator hidden
functions.description: When an element receives focus, it must not be completely hidden by other content (sticky headers, modals, etc.).

recommendation.title: Focus must not be hidden
recommendation.description: When an element receives focus, it must not be completely hidden by other content (sticky headers, modals, etc.).

action.message: This may hide focus indicator - ensure focus remains visible

functions.name: Text spacing restrictions
functions.description: Text should reflow when users adjust line-height, letter-spacing, or word-spacing. Avoid fixed px line-heights.

recommendation.title: Allow text spacing adjustments
recommendation.description: Text should reflow when users adjust line-height, letter-spacing, or word-spacing. Avoid fixed px line-heights.

action.message: Fixed px line-height may prevent text spacing adjustments - use unitless or em

functions.name: Horizontal scrolling required
functions.description: Content should not require horizontal scrolling at 320px width. Use word-wrap, overflow-wrap, or allow natural text reflow.

recommendation.title: Enable line wrapping
recommendation.description: Content should not require horizontal scrolling at 320px width. Use word-wrap, overflow-wrap, or allow natural text reflow.

action.message: May cause horizontal scrolling - allow text to wrap
